characters.name: Alastair
characters.description: AlastairBackground informationFirst appearance"Civil Wart"Latest appearance"All In"(billboard)VoiceLiam O'BrienCharacter informationAgeTeenagerGenderMale ♂SpeciesHuman/Deer hybridAlliesConstanceEnemiesHunterAlastairis a fictional character inLove Choice, a teen romance movie thatAnneshows to the inhabitants ofWartwoodduring their theater night in the episode "Civil Wart". Alastair has a head similar to that of a deer's, not to mention his antlers and black deer-like eyes. Other than that, he wears a black zip-up hoodie, blue jeans with the cuff's rolled up and purple sneakers. Alistair is voiced byLiam O'Brien.

characters.name: Albus Duckweed
characters.description: Albus DuckweedBackground informationFirst appearance"Dating Season"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing"VoiceKevin McDonaldCharacter informationOther namesMr. DuckweedGooselily (Mayor Toadstool)AgeAdultGenderMale ♂SpeciesNewtOccupationRestaurant criticEvent announcerResistance fighter (formerly)AffiliationsWartwood ResistanceGoalTo shut downStumpy's Diner(failed)To defeat King Andrias (succeeded)HomeWartwood SwampAlliesAnne BoonchuyStumpy StumpsonSasha WaybrightCaptain GrimeEnemiesAnne Boonchuy (formerly)Stumpy Stumpson (formerly)Mayor Toadstool(status unknown)King AndriasLikesCriticizing other's workExotic and exciting foodWeird and unusual stuffDislikesBoring food and restaurantsBeing called GooselilyFateHelped rebuild Amphibia after the Calamity War Albus Duckweedis a recurring character inAmphibia. He is anewtcritic for different occasions and is the most popular critic in the town ofWartwood. He also serves as the announcer for the town's public events. Albus is a green newt with a light green underbelly and darker green spots on his tail, red pupils, and has teal hair tied into a ponytail with a purple bow. He has a semi-noticeable Adam's apple.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaNormalSlimeBackground informationOnly appearance"The Shut-In!"VoiceBrenda SongInspirationAnne BoonchuyCharacter informationAge12-13GenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanOccupationStudentAffiliationsSaint Joe's SchoolHomeEarthAlliesTwigMollyHaddieBroadieEnemiesScreen FiendLikesActing out stories with objectsDislikesCute animal videosAnnais the protagonist ofAnne Boonchuy'sstoryPhone Moin the episode "The Shut-In!". She is based on Anne herself. She is similar to Anne. They both have messy brown hair. Unlike Anne, however, Anna has some of her hair up in a little ponytail. Anna wears the same school uniform as her counterpart. However, her uniform's logo is SaintJoe'sSchool instead ofSaint James Middle School. Anna's shoes are more resembling of tennis shoes, whileAnne's shoesare high tops.

characters.name: Apothecary Gary
characters.description: Apothecary GaryJeremyLloydLloyd (hooded)Background informationFirst appearance"Children of the Spore"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing"VoiceTony HaleCharacter informationFull nameApothecary GaryOther namesApothegary (himself, Hop Pop)GenderGenderless øSpeciesMind-controlling mushroomOccupationSalesman (formerly)Gardenton's headmasterApothecaryAffiliationsLloyd(former host)Jeremy(current host)GardentonWartwood ResistanceGoalTake overAmphibia(formerly)To protect Gardenton (ongoing)To defeat King Andrias (complete)Find the other remaining Mind-controlling mushroom (complete)HomeGardenton,AmphibiaRelativesHis sporesAlliesHoraceAnne BoonchuySprig PlantarPolly PlantarHop Pop PlantarLeopold LoggleUnnamed smaller Mind-controlling mushroomMinionsBrainwashed citizens ofWartwood(formerly)Citizens ofGardentonJeremy(unwitting host)EnemiesHop Pop Plantar(formerly)Bessie(formerly)Anne Boonchuy(formerly)Sprig Plantar(formerly)Polly Plantar(formerly)Leopold Loggle(formerly)King AndriasFrobotsLikesSpreading his spores (formerly)Brainwashing Amphibians (formerly)GardentonWilling subjectsDislikesGardenton's destructionBessieKing AndriasPowers and abilitiesBrainwashingCreating brainwashing sporesFateEaten byBessiebut revived shortly after by infectingJeremyLives peacefully with another mind-controlling mushroom most likely still as head of Gardenton.Quote"I'm just a cute little beetle!" Apothecary Garyis a minor character inAmphibia, who serves as the main antagonist during the episode "Children of the Spore". In the episode, his character was revealed to be arare species of mind-controlling mushroom, controlling anamphibiannamedLloyd. He was defeated byHop Pop, but survived thanks toJeremytaking in his spores. Gary is a giant mushroom that usually sits on top of his hosts' heads. His stem is white colored and his head is vibrant violet colored with many blue spots around it and a few bubbles around on it.

characters.name: Archie
characters.description: ArchieNormalResistanceBackground informationFirst appearance"Anne Theft Auto"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationAgeAdultGenderMale ♂SpeciesSpiderOccupationMember of the Wartwood Resistance (formerly)AffiliationsWartwood ResistanceGoalDefeat Andrias (succeeded)HomeWartwood Swamp,AmphibiaRelativesSadie Croaker(owner)AlliesSadie CroakerAnne BoonchuySprig PlantarPolly PlantarChuckHop Pop PlantarWartwood CommunitySasha WaybrightCaptain GrimeEnemiesBogFensMireJonahSasha Waybright(formerly)Captain Grime(formerly)Toad Soldiers (formerly)Chicka-liskFrobotsKing AndriasNellieThe CoreLikesSadie CroakerDislikesBeing scaredPowers and abilitiesVenomWebbingFateContinued living with Mrs. Croaker as Amphibia was being rebuiltArchieis a petspiderowned byMrs. Croaker. His venom can cause paralysis and he has the ability to create large webs. Archie has been with Mrs. Croaker for many years, as he was seen in a picture during her youth. Archie is a small, black furry spider. He has six red eyes of different sizes, and a purple tongue. He acts much like a dog, as he makes high-pitched yipping sounds and sleeps in a dog bed. As of "Commander Anne", Archie is wearing a small black eye patch covering his big left eye, alongside a pointy camouflage-green helmet with the logo ofAmphibiaon it. He no longer has these in the epilogue.

characters.name: Bailey
characters.description: BaileyNormalAggressiveBackground informationFirst appearance"The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing" (imagined)VoiceJulian EdwardsCharacter informationAgeChildGenderMale ♂SpeciesFrogHomeBittyburg,AmphibiaRelativesUnnamed fatherUnnamed older sisterAlliesHop Pop PlantarEnemiesThe Hasselback Gang Baileyis a young frog and an inhabitant ofBittyburg. He made his debut in the episode "The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar". He is shown to have a great respect forHop Popupon hearing that he fought toad soldiers. He seems to have joined theWartwood Resistancewith other Amphibians by "Commander Anne".

characters.name: Barrel
characters.description: Barrel the BraveBackground informationFirst appearance"The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers" (pictured)"Barrel's Warhammer" (mentioned)"True Colors" (flashback)"The Core & The King" (debut)Latest appearance"All In" (flashback)VoiceJason Ritter[1]Character informationOther namesBarrel the BraveAgeAdultBirth dateBefore 1019GenderMale ♂SpeciesToadOccupationNewtopiaguard toad(formerly)Amphibia outskirts guardAffiliationsLeviathan family(formerly)GoalSpend time with his friends(before the Calamity Box was stolen)Protect the Amphibia outskirts(ultimately)HomeAmphibiaNewtopia(formerly)Amphibia's outskirts(ultimately)AlliesKing Andrias(best friend; strained)Leif(best friend)Moss MenEnemiesKing AldrichNarwhal Worm(killer)LikesHuggingHaving fun with Leif and AndriasDislikesHis friends splitting upHaving to choose between his two best friendsPowers and abilitiesStrengthWeaponsHis WarhammerFateKilled by the Narwhal Worm while protecting a village Barrel the Brave, is a minor character inAmphibia. He was an old friend ofKing AndriasandLeifbefore the trio ultimately separated, and used to have awarhammerwhich he used during battles. He was later killed trying to defend a village from anarwhal worm. His warhammer was later found bySasha Waybright, who then used it to knock the narwhal worm out after driving it to theNorth Tower. Barrel was a light green horned toad with a mint green belly. He also had light yellowish eyes with red pupils, and sharp dark green teeth.

characters.name: Bartley, Branson, and Blair
characters.description: Bartley, Branson & BlairBackground informationFirst appearance"Marcy at the Gates"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing"VoiceSam RiegelCharacter informationOther namesTriple B (MarcyandKing Andrias)AgeAdultsGenderMale ♂SpeciesNewtsOccupationTop Newtopian scientists and strategists (likely formerly)Gardeners/Guards (currently)AffiliationsKing AndriasMarcy WuHomeNewtopia,Amphibia(possibly formerly)AlliesEach otherMarcy WuKing AndriasEnemiesHop Pop Plantar(formerly)LikesChristmasDislikesCreatures and CavernsFightingFrogs(formerly)Powers and abilitiesIntelligenceFateImprisoned and serving time as gardeners/guards to atone for their crimes Bartley, Branson, and Blairare minor characters ofAmphibia. They are a trio of newts living inNewtopia, whoMarcynicknames "Triple B". They are some of the palace's top analysts who willingly worked forKing Andriasduring his attempted conquest ofEarth, starting inLos Angeles, California. They made an appearance in the flashforward of "The Hardest Thing", where they are seen in chains with Andrias, helping the former king farm. As they were loyal to the king, they were exiled fromAmphibiaand forced to help Andrias restore the land destroyed by him. They could also be serving as guards or watchmen for Andrias since they are standing off to the side and not seen actually working and not fully chained up like the former king.

characters.name: Captain Beatrix
characters.description: Captain BeatrixCurrentDebutBackground informationFirst appearance"Barrel's Warhammer"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing" (background)VoiceAisling BeaCharacter informationAgeAdult (older than Grime)GenderFemale ♀SpeciesToadOccupationLord of the West TowerResistance fighterAffiliationsToad ArmyWartwood ResistanceGoalDefeat Andrias (succeeded)HomeAmphibiaRelativesCaptain Grime(younger brother)Magnus (uncle, deceased)AlliesSasha WaybrightCaptain BufoCaptain AldoAnne BoonchuySprig Plantar(former opponent)Tritonio EspadaHop Pop PlantarSadie CroakerEnemiesKing AndriasThe CoreLikesMaking fun ofGrimeDislikesBeing taunted byGrimeWorking withNewts(formerly)WeaponsTwo axes Captain Beatrixis a recurring character inAmphibia. She is the older sister ofCaptain Grime, the lord of the West Tower, and one of the three Toad Lords commanding theToad Army. Captain Beatrix is a short, middle-aged toad with swamp green skin and a light green underbelly. She has dark green spots on her. She has a few pointy grey teeth in her mouth. She has deep green hair tied up in a braid with a dark brown hair tie. Her right eye has a green pupil, no iris and green sclera, and the left had a lavender sclera, a light pink iris and no pupil. This eye also has a scar around it.

characters.name: Bella
characters.description: BellaBackground informationFirst appearance"The Plantars Check In"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing" (imagined)VoiceKristen Schaal[1]Character informationOther namesBella the BellhopGenderFemale ♀SpeciesNewtOccupationHemisphere HotelemployeeAffiliationsHemisphere HotelNewtopia University(formerly)Wartwood ResistanceHomeNewtopia,AmphibiaRelativesUnnamed motherAlliesSprig PlantarHemisphere Hotel's manager (boss)EnemiesSprig Plantar (formerly)King AndriasFrobotsLikesBeing hiredSundaesDislikesBeing firedHer student debtQuote"Bella the Bellhop at your service." Bella, also known asBella the Bellhop, is a minor character ofAmphibia. She is a newt living inNewtopia, who works in theHemisphere Hotel. Bella is a light orangenewtwith a lighter underbelly, freckles on her cheek and face, and short brown hair. She has dark splotches on her tail.

characters.name: Bernardo
characters.description: BernardoBackground informationFirst appearance"Bessie & MicroAngelo"Latest appearance"Marcy Theme Song Takeover"VoiceThomas MiddleditchCharacter informationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNewtOccupationArmorerHomeNewtopia,AmphibiaAlliesMarcy WuAnne BoonchuySprig PlantarBernardois a minor character ofAmphibia. He is the best armorer ofNewtopia, who designedMarcy'sNewtopian ranger suit, and was later hired by her to giveAnnea new look. Bernardo is a medium-sized pink newt with violet spots, a slender build, light pink belly, and dark gray hair standing upright and combed forward with a ponytail in the back. His eyes are bright yellow with brown pupils. His clothing consists of a white coat with golden shoulder pads with two pearls on top, round double cuffs at the end of the sleeves, with a dark gray undershirt from which part of his sleeve protrudes below the cuffs of the coat, a light green scarf, light gray pants, white shoes, and a light green bowtie in his ponytail.

characters.name: Bessie
characters.description: BessieBackground informationFirst appearance"The Domino Effect" (mentioned)"Anne Theft Auto" (debut)Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationAgeAdultGenderFemale ♀SpeciesSnailOccupationVehicleAffiliationsWartwood ResistanceGoalTo defeat King Andrias (succeeded)HomePlantar Farm,Wartwood Swamp,Frog Valley,AmphibiaRelativesPlantar family(owners)MicroAngelo(protégé)Joe Sparrow(mate)Three unnamed snirds(children)AlliesAnne BoonchuyMarcy WuSasha WaybrightLeopold LoggleFroboEnemiesHedgehogsApothecary Gary(formerly)RocKing AndriasFrobotsThe CoreLikesMushroomsGetting flirted with by Joe SparrowHer familyDislikesHedgehogsHer family in dangerMicroAngelo getting into troublePowers and abilitiesSpeedingFast eatingFateMated with Joe Sparrow Bessieis a supporting character inAmphibia. She is thePlantar familysnail, who was purchased years ago byHop Popduring an auction. When the Plantars andAnnetraveled toNewtopia, she pulled theFwagon. Bessie is mostly purple, with a light-violet shaded front. She has a dull-beige underside, and a rusty-orange shell where her saddle and pouches are located. Her eyes are located on two stalks which are a darker shaded purple with dotted pupils.

characters.name: Bibsy
characters.description: BibsyNormalPixelsBackground informationFirst appearance"Adventures in Catsitting"Latest appearance"All In" (background)InspirationMickey MouseKermit the FrogBugs BunnyCharacter informationGenderMale ♂SpeciesRabbitOccupationMascotPowers and abilitiesDancingBrand recognitionBibsyis a fictional media character ofAmphibia. He is a fictitious rabbit that is very popular onEarth, generating a lot of media related to him. Bibsy is a light purple rabbit with long ears, off-white eyes, and black pupils. He also has long legs and arms. Bibsy wears a small red ribbon.

characters.name: Bog
characters.description: BogCurrentBanditBackground informationFirst appearance"Toad Tax"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing" (pictured)VoiceDarin De PaulCharacter informationAgeAdultGenderMale ♂SpeciesToadOccupationTax collector (formerly)Bandit (formerly)Leader ofToad Tower/Toad Armygarrison (formerly)Resistance fighter (formerly)Bog & The Boys Moving & Junk Service (currently; possible founder)AffiliationsToad Army(formerly)JacindaWartwood Resistance(formerly)Bog & The Boys Moving & Junk Service (currently)GoalCollect Wartwood’s taxes (succeeded)HomeToad TowerAlliesFensMireCaptain Grime(possibly)Sasha Waybright(possibly)JacindaMinionsUnnamed toadsEnemiesAnne Boonchuy(formerly)Sprig Plantar(formerly)Hop Pop Plantar(formerly)Polly Plantar(formerly)Mayor Toadstool(formerly)Citizens ofWartwood Swamp(formerly)LikesFighting (formerly)Collecting taxes (formerly)Moving & junk service (currently)DislikesOrders being defiedNot getting paid enoughWeaponsGiant hammer (formerly)Bug bladeFateRunning a moving service with Jacinda, Mire, and FensQuote"Sorry, creature. It's just business."Bogis a recurring character inAmphibia. He was a greedy, yet skilled, tax collector fromToad Tower, who came toWartwoodfor monthly taxes withFensandMire. He became a bandit for months after the destruction of Toad Tower in the season 1 finale "Reunion". He was later appointed byJacinda, aNewtopiannoble, as the new leader of both Toad Tower and theToad Army. Bog later joins theWartwood Resistancefollowing the invasion of Newtopia. In the series' epilogue in "The Hardest Thing", Bog became part of "Bog & The Boys Moving & Junk Service". Bog is a large toad with red skin and an orange, lighter underbelly. He has a crest of horn-like protrusions on the top of his head. He, like his comrades, wears metal armor with leather pauldrons and a silver "Amphibia" emblem across his right shoulder.

characters.name: Braddock
characters.description: BraddockCurrentDebutBackground informationFirst appearance"Prison Break"Latest appearance"Barrel's Warhammer" (physical)"The Hardest Thing" (pictured)VoiceKristen Johnston(Season 1)April Winchell(Season 2)Character informationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesToadOccupationToad Tower prison guard (formerly)Grime's Toad Army soldier (formerly)AffiliationsGrime'sToad Army(formerly)AlliesPercy(boyfriend)GrimeSasha(formerly)EnemiesHeronsNarwhal WormLikesGardeningSocializing Braddockis a supporting character inAmphibia. She is a former prison guard ofToad Towersince the events of "Reunion". She and her boyfriend,Percy, were the only toads who stayed with their commanders,Captain GrimeandSasha, after Grime became a fugitive. She and Percy eventually left them after Sasha disregarded their safety in "Barrel's Warhammer". In "The Hardest Thing", Sasha tells Grime to find them and apologize to them for her.

characters.name: Brian
characters.description: BrianBackground informationOnly appearance"Sasha's Angels"VoiceLaila BerzinsCharacter informationAgeAdultGenderMale ♂SpeciesToadOccupationTax accountant (formerly)MarauderAffiliationsThe MaraudersGoalSell the Wartwood Resistance members toKing Andriasfor money (failed)AlliesBarry(boss)Fellow MaraudersEnemiesWartwood ResistanceLikesDrinking the blood of his enemiesEating dessert for breakfastDislikesHis beard being ripped offPowers and abilitiesLarge sizeBrute strengthBrianis a member ofthe Marauders. BeforeKing Andriasbegan preparing for theinvasionofEarth, Brian was a tax accountant, but ever since the corrupt monarch'sFrobotmilitary reign began inAmphibia, he became a crazed barbarian who eventually joined  the Marauders. After he stoleToadie'sbow tie, the small frog went nuts and ripped off Brian's beard and then led his fellowrebelsinto destroying the Marauders' camp. Brian is voiced byLaila Berzins.

characters.name: Broadie
characters.description: BroadieBackground informationOnly appearance"The Shut-In!"VoiceJack McBrayerInspirationToadieCharacter informationAge11-12GenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanOccupationStudentAffiliationsSaint Joe's SchoolHomeEarthAlliesAnnaTwigMollyHaddieEnemiesScreen FiendDislikesCute animal videosBroadieis a character fromAnne'sstoryPhone Moin the episode "The Shut-In!". He is based onToadie,Mayor Toadstool'sassistant. Broadie has a similar appearance to Toadie, with dirty blonde hair, circular eyes, a wide mouth, and freckles on his cheeks. He has a fair complexion. Broadie wears a white button-up shirt with a big red bowtie and a black vest bearing theSaintJoe'sSchool logo on the upper right side. He wears wine-red shorts, long white socks, and brown lace-up shoes.

characters.name: Burrow Bug
characters.description: Burrow BugSpeciesCydnidaeBackground InformationOnly Appearance"Flood, Sweat & Tears"TheBurrow Bugis a pest insect that resides underground, making tunnels in which to live in and to feed off vegetables. The Burrow Bug has a light brown abdomen lined with a black stripe and a bright chestnut-shaded shell that encases its short wings. The bug also has long incisor-like mandibles and small pale yellow eyes which sit at the side of its head.

characters.name: Captain Aldo
characters.description: Captain AldoNormalVinesBackground informationOnly appearance"Barrel's Warhammer"VoiceRon Cephas JonesCharacter informationAgeAdultGenderMale ♂SpeciesToadOccupationSenior leader in theToad ArmyCaptain of the North Toad TowerAffiliationsToad ArmyCaptain GrimeSasha WaybrightCaptain BufoCaptain BeatrixCaptain Aldois a minor character inAmphibia. He is the senior leader of theToad Army, captain of theNorth Tower, and one of the three Toad Lords. Aldo has pale skin and wears a brown robe as well as a brown cape with a spider shaped clasp. He is seen with vines around his body and empty eye sockets with thick white eyebrows. Having achieved the ranks of senior leader and tower captain, Aldo was extremely ancient and so sedentary that vines grew up around him. Despite this, he could still be stirred to action on rare occasions. Most notably, afterGrimeandSashaproposed that the Toad Army unite behind them, Aldo suggested that they demonstrate their worth by retrievingBarrel's Warhammer.

characters.name: Captain Bufo
characters.description: Captain BufōBackground informationFirst appearance"Barrel's Warhammer"Latest appearance"All In" (cameo)VoiceDaisuke TsujiCharacter informationGenderMale ♂SpeciesToadOccupationLord of the East TowerAffiliationsToad ArmyCaptain GrimeSasha WaybrightWartwood ResistanceGoalTo help Sasha and Grime conquerNewtopia(temporarily succeeded)HomeThe East TowerAlliesSasha WaybrightCaptain GrimeCaptain BeatrixCaptain AldoEnemiesKing AndriasQuote"No toad has ever gone after the hammer and made it out alive.""This I've gotta see!"Captain Bufōis the Lord of the East Tower and one of the three Toad Lords commanding theToad Army. Captain Bufō is an anthropomorphic Bufō toad with grayish-green skin and yellow sclera eyes. He has long black hair tied in a modern rendition of the chonmage, a Japanese hair bun. He has short, square-shaved sideburns, and an evenly cut goatee. Captain Bufō dresses in a loose set of gray ō-yoroi, an early form of samurai plated armor. The spaulders on each arm are segmented in three pieces tied to the dark-gray breast plate with yellow ropes.

characters.name: Cardinal
characters.description: CardinalBackground informationOnly appearance"The Second Temple"Character informationSpeciesCardinalHomeAmphibia ArcticLikesEating caterpillarsTheCardinalis a species of bird that lives in theAmphibia Arctic. It heavily resembles the averageEarthcardinal, except it has four eyes instead of two. A cardinal was summoned byValerianaas part of a trial whenAnne,Marcy, and thePlantarstraveled tothe Second Templeto charge the blueCalamity Gem. The cardinal nearly ate Marcy and attacked the Plantars because of the caterpillar-wool coats everyone was wearing. To get rid of the cardinal, Anne threw her coat down the mountain, and the cardinal went after it.

characters.name: Carnivorous tomato plant
characters.description: Carnivorous tomato plantBackground informationFirst appearance"Hop Luck"Latest appearance"The Hardest Thing" (pictured)Character informationSpeciesPossiblysolanumHomeAmphibia Thecarnivorous tomato plantis atomatoplant located in northernAmphibia. It is classified as a hostile plant. It first appears in the episode "Hop Luck", in whichAnne,Sprig,Polly, andHop Popsearch for tomatoes in order to make pizza for the annual "Hop Luck" event in town. The carnivorous tomato plant resembles a Venus flytrap-like plant with three heads atop long red stems joined at the base of the plant, where bunches of tomatoes are located. Each head possesses a large mouth and rows of sharp, white teeth and a green flower-like stalk. Their stomach appears to be conjoined and their nourishment shared between one another. They also have hidden elongated red tendrils which are used to reach and grab prey that are out of their reach. The plant's weak point is its throat, which can be eaten raw and once damaged causes the plant to die promptly.
